prompt: Write a letter to request information about an English course.
text:
Dear Mr Brown,

I am writing to request more information about the English course advertised on your website. Firstly, I would like to know when the next class starts and how many students there are in each group.

Could you please provide further details about the course fee and the weekly timetable? I would be grateful if you could also tell me whether there is a placement test before the course begins.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience. I look forward to hearing from you.

Yours sincerely,
Nghia
